query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auditLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NULL COMMENT 'Affected tenant (NULL = platform-level action)',
  actorId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'openId of the user who performed the action',
  actorEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  actorRole VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'e.g. tenant.create, tenant.suspend, user.login',
  targetType VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'e.g. tenant, tenantUser, task',
  targetId VARCHAR(128) NULL COMMENT 'ID of the affected record',
  metadata JSON NULL COMMENT 'Extra context: before/after values, IP, etc.',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_actor (actorId),
  INDEX idx_tenant (tenantId),
  INDEX idx_action (action),
  INDEX idx_created (createdAt)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
command:

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auditLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NULL COMMENT 'Affected tenant (NULL = platform-level action)',
  actorId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'openId of the user who performed the action',
  actorEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  actorRole VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'e.g. tenant.create, tenant.suspend, user.login',
  targetType VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'e.g. tenant, tenantUser, task',
  targetId VARCHAR(128) NULL COMMENT 'ID of the affected record',
  metadata JSON NULL COMMENT 'Extra context: before/after values, IP, etc.',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_actor (actorId),
  INDEX idx_tenant (tenantId),
  INDEX idx_action (action),
  INDEX idx_created (createdAt)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
